name: High-Net-Worth Foreign Asset Verification (T1135)
description: Complete Wei Chen's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return in StudioTax 2024 using the documents at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\. The return must include T4 income, RRSP contributions, the Foreign Tax Credit (T2209) with foreign dividend income and tax paid converted to CAD at the provided exchange rate, and a T1135 Foreign Income Verification Statement using the Detailed Reporting method. Save the completed return as 'wei_chen.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Form T1135 and CRA Folio S5-F2-C1 (Foreign Tax Credit)
metadata.key_complexity: Currency conversion, T2209 Foreign Tax Credit, and T1135 Detailed Reporting Method
